<script>
// Video intros — fade out when each video ends
['t1','t3','t5'].forEach(id=>{
  const intro = document.getElementById(id+'-intro');
  const vid = document.getElementById(id+'-video');
  if(vid && intro){
    vid.addEventListener('ended', ()=>{
      intro.classList.add('fade-out');
    });
    setTimeout(()=>{ intro.classList.add('fade-out'); }, 9000);
  }
});
</script>
